text.title: video-gen-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for video-gen-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Assuming output[0] works for all Replicate models.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Replicate returns an iterator or a URL string depending on the model. Calling [0] on a string iterator returns the first character.

failure-mode.description: Passing a Runway task ID to a Luma polling endpoint or vice versa.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Task IDs and generation IDs are provider-specific and non-portable. Keep provider context alongside each ID.

failure-mode.description: Runway SDK image_to_video.create requires an image URL even for text-only generation on some model versions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Have a fallback blank image URL ready; verify endpoint with current SDK docs before use.

failure-mode.description: Replicate returns an iterator or a URL depending on model and output type; output[0] fails if output is not a list.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each model has different output shapes. Check type before indexing.

failure-mode.description: Luma keyframes.frame0.type = "generation" for extension requires the source generation ID, not the video URL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents must track IDs, not just URLs, for chaining operations across the same provider.

failure-mode.description: VideoGenerationService.extend_video extracts frames from a local file then re-uploads; if the source clip was generated by a different provider, seams are visible.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cross-provider stitching produces discontinuities in motion and color.

failure-mode.description: Async _upload_image is a stub in VideoGenerationService.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Any agent that calls generate_from_image(image_path=...) will hit NotImplementedError until implemented per storage backend.

failure-mode.description: Task IDs and generation IDs are provider-specific and non-portable; never pass a Runway task ID to a Luma polling call.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provider contexts are incompatible. Keep provider alongside ID.

failure-mode.description: Error messages from Runway on content policy violations are terse ("FAILED") with no explanation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent must not retry without modifying the prompt when FAILED is returned.
